title: handle_wallet_pay: balance TOCTOU — concurrent calls over-spend on stale read
description: api.rs handle_wallet_pay reads balance then rejects if amount > confirmed_zatoshi. This check is not atomic with the actual wallet send (which happens later in the payment flow). Concurrent POST /api/wallet/pay calls can all pass the balance gate then all create sessions and broadcast PaymentAction::Request, over-spending the wallet or creating sessions that will fail at settlement. The nie-qmq3.7 issue tracked the same pattern in cli/commands.rs; the daemon API repeats it. Fix: serialize concurrent payment initiations, or delegate the definitive balance check to the transaction builder.
